CVE-2021-43618.title: GNU Multiple Precision Arithmetic Library (GMP) through 6.2.1 has ...
CVE-2021-43618.description: GNU Multiple Precision Arithmetic Library (GMP) through 6.2.1 has an mpz/inp_raw.c integer overflow and resultant buffer overflow via crafted input, leading to a segmentation fault on 32-bit platforms.
